overall.description: First-person exploration through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, walking from a narrow commercial alley onto wide urban streets with towering megabuildings, industrial overpasses, and sparse pedestrian activity under clear morning sunlight. The player character navigates intersections and sidewalks while observing the futuristic cyberpunk architecture and occasional vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with closed storefronts

events.description: exits narrow alley into wide open intersection with clear view of the mega tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, emerging from the alley toward the open street

notable_agents.action: figure sitting near the wall beside the digital billboard

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement with pink and purple colors on the building wall
tall futuristic skyscraper with red vertical stripes and glass facade dominating the skyline
metal roll-down shutters on ground floor commercial units with blue trim
tall street light with horizontal arm extending over the road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow commercial alley with a large digital billboard on the left and closed shop fronts. The camera walks forward, emerging into a wider intersection where the massive Arasaka tower becomes visible in the distance. The lighting is bright morning sun casting long shadows across the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial transit corridor with overhead pipelines and power lines

events.description: turning to face the bright morning sun causing strong backlight and lens flare effects
crossing from the road onto the sidewalk while passing concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk while navigating around concrete planters

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket standing near the concrete barrier on the right side

entered.detail: massive elevated industrial pipeline structure running horizontally across the street
yellow and black transit station building with green neon signage
long concrete dividers with bushes separating the sidewalk from the road
industrial chimneys emitting smoke visible in the background beyond the overpass

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an industrial area dominated by massive overhead pipelines and power structures. The camera faces into the bright morning sun creating a backlit atmosphere. The yellow NCART station becomes visible on the right as the character walks along a sidewalk separated from the road by concrete planters with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with transit station and multi-level parking

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall buildings and sky, then returns to street level
large blue industrial truck drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection while looking up at the towering architecture and observing surroundings

notable_agents.action: large blue cargo truck driving along the road from left to right

entered.detail: open-air concrete parking garage with multiple levels and columns
modern building with reflective glass windows and vertical lines
illuminated purple and blue holographic advertisement on the side of a building
row of palm trees lining the sidewalk providing sparse shade

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a major intersection near the yellow NCART station, with a multi-level parking structure on the left and modern glass buildings on the right. The camera looks up at the towering skyscrapers against the blue sky. A large blue truck passes by on the street as the character continues walking along the palm-lined sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with benches and storefronts approaching intersection

events.description: red sports car drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching the next intersection, passing benches and street furniture

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: concrete and metal benches lined up along the left side of the walkway
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the curb
elevated pedestrian bridge or transit track crossing over the street ahead
scattered cardboard pieces and litter on the concrete pavement

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a commercial sidewalk with benches on the left and various storefronts. A red car passes by on the street. The camera approaches an intersection with an overhead walkway visible in the distance. Cardboard debris litters parts of the sidewalk as the walk continues through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined commercial alleyway into a sprawling industrial urban corridor under the bright morning sun. It begins by moving past closed shop fronts and a large digital billboard, gradually emerging from the narrow passage into a wide intersection where the massive Arasaka tower looms in the distance. As the camera advances, the open city space shifts into an industrial zone dominated by heavy overhead pipelines and towering power structures. The perspective then turns directly into the sunlight, creating a backlit atmosphere as the path leads past concrete planters and sparse vegetation toward a yellow NCART station on the right.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a towering urban intersection toward a more grounded commercial street under a clear blue sky. It begins by crossing a major junction near a yellow NCART station, where the camera tilts upward to capture the scale of glass skyscrapers and a multi-level parking structure. As the character continues along a palm-lined sidewalk, a large blue truck passes by, guiding the movement forward into a denser commercial zone. The scene then shifts to a sidewalk lined with benches and storefronts, where a red car glides past while the camera tracks toward a distant overhead walkway. Finally, the path leads through an urban environment scattered with cardboard debris as the character approaches another intersection.
